message.content:
@startuml
title Memverifikasi SPT BKA

actor AdministratorTU as admin_tu
participant "Dashboard_V" as dashboard_v <<Boundary>>
participant "KontrolSPTBKA_V" as kontrol_sptbka_v <<Boundary>>
control Admin_C as admin_c <<Control>>
control KontroSPT_C as kontrospt_c <<Control>>
entity SuratPerintahTugas_E as surat_perintagtugas_e <<Entity>>


admin_tu ->> dashboard_v : 3 klik menu SPT BKA 
dashboard_v --> admin_tu :2 Halaman Dashboard 

kontrospt_c <- - admin_c :1 load->view()  
kontrol_sptbka_v <-- kontrospt_c :7 load->view()   
surat_perintagtugas_e --x kontrospt_c :6  

dashboard_v ->> kontrospt_c :4 controlsptbka ()    
kontrospt_c ->> surat_perintagtugas_e :5   

kontrol_sptbka_v <--> admin_tu :8 Halaman SPT BKA 


admin_tu ->> kontrol_sptbka_v :9 klik tombol Accept SPT BKA     
kontrol_sptbka_v ->> kontrospt_c :10 acceptsptbkalengkap()      
kontrospt_c <-> surat_perintagtugas_e :11  


kontrol_sptbka_v <-- kontrospt_c :13 load->view()       
kontrol_sptbka_v ---> admin_tu :14 Halaman SPT BKA   



@enduml
